headline: Shares of banks and financial services stocks are trading lower as the ongoing Middle East conflict drives oil prices higher and heightens inflation concerns, weighing on broader market sentiment. A stronger dollar and diminishing expectations for future rate cuts are adding further pressure on the sector.
summary: Shares of banks and financial services stocks are trading lower as the ongoing Middle East conflict drives oil prices higher and heightens inflation concerns, weighing on broader market sentiment. A stronger dollar and diminishing expectations for future rate cuts are adding further pressure on the sector.

headline: Value + Quality + Cash Flow Is King
summary: The Dividend Kings' Scott Kaufman explains the large rotation from growth focused investments to being overwhelmingly focused on value.
